entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS439) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADD NEW IPS CLINS AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2073.02E. 2. ADD ONE (1) NET SCOUT SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2140.01E. 3. ADD TWO (2) NETAPP SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2143.01E. 4. ADD FIFTEEN (15) CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2145.01E. . 5. ADD FOUR (4) APCC SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2147.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. ADD DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS ICB CASE NUMBER AND PRICE AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2077.01E
2. ADD ACCESS ADD DEDICATED ETHERNET ACCESS PRICES DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE3888.01E
3. ADD ACCESS ADD DOMESTIC ETHERNET ACCESS PRICES AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2091.01E
4. ADD NBIP-VPNS ADD CLIN FEATURE PRICES AS DETAILED IN SUBMISSION AE2079.01E

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS441) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TO ADD ONE APCC SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2152.01E.
TO ADD FOUR CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2112.01E.
TO ADD EIGHTEEN CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2151.01E.
TO ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS BY SWC, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2093.01E.
TO ADD PRICE REDUCTION MTIPS PORTS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AE2149.01P.
THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS442) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES 1. ADDITION OF ONE PORT FOR INTERNET PROCOTOL SERVICE CLIN AND PRICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2096.01E. 2. ADDITION OF FIVE SERVICE WIRE CENTERS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2099.01E. 3. PRICE REDUCTION FOR EXISTING STORAGE SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2130.01P. 4. ADDITION OF ONE SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS 2MBPS WITH ELECTRICAL INTERFACE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2103.01E. 5. ADDITION OF TWELVE ACCESS 10 MBPS SHARED ETHERNET SWC, AS DETAILED IN AE2104.01E. 6. ADDITION OF CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN AND ENGINEERING SERVICES, AS DETAILED IN AE2134.01E. 7. UPDATING PRICE OF ONE CISCO WIRELINE SEDS, AS DETAILED IN AE2146.01P. 8. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 9. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS444) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2109.01E. 2. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2163.01E. 3. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2110.01E. 4. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2141.01E. 5. ADDITION OF CIPS PORTS OCONUS CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2154.01E. 6. ADDITION OF UPDATED SOW TO POP MAPPING TABLE CHANGES TO TABLE B.6.5.2 AS DETAILED IN AE2113.01E. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS445) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: ADDITION OF ONE (1) SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS (100 MBPS WITH OPTICAL INTERFACE) CLIN AND PRICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2118.01E. ADDITION OF TWO (2) INFOBLOX SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROCOTOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2160.01E. ADDTION OF ONE (1) EDGEWATER SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2166.01E. ADDITION OF TWO (2) JUNIPER SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROCOTOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2167.01E. ADDITION OF ONE (1) DEDICATED ACCESS ARRANGEMENT (10GBPS), AS DETAILED IN AE2169.01E. ADDITION OF APCC SED TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROCOTOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN AE2171.02E. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS446) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF MNS CASE NUMBERS AND PRICES, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2131.01E. 2. ADDITION OF CRITICAL, T1 ACCESS NRC AND MRC PRICES, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2153.01E. 3. ADDTION OF A DEDICATED ACCESS ARRANGMENT (DAA) PRICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2170.01E. 4. ADDITION OF ONE (1) VBRICK, ONE (1) RIVERBED AND FIVE (5) CISCO SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROCOTOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AE2172.01E. 5. ADDITION OF ADDS FIFTEEN (15) CISCO SEDS TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN AE2175.01E. 6. ADDITION ONE (1) RELCOMM SED TO THE AT&T NETWORX CONTRACT SUPPORTING NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DETAILED IN AE2176.02E. 7. ADDITION TO ADD PRICE FOR DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DETAILED IN AE2173.01E. 8. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 9. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0041 (PS450) awarded to AT&T CORP., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. INCORPORATE PROPOSAL AE1698.05E, RECEIVED BY GSA ON AUGUST 12, 2016, WHICH PROPOSES TO ADD PRICING IN ORDER TO EXTEND THE NETWORX CONTRACT BY AN ADDITIONAL PERIOD OF UP TO THREE YEARS (ONE (1) YEAR BASE EXTENSION PERIOD WITH TWO (2) ONE YEAR EXTENSION OPTION PERIODS) FROM THE CURRENT CONTRACT END DATE OF CONTRACT END DATE OF MAY 30, 2017 TO MAY 30, 2020. IT ALSO PROPOSES TO REMOVE CLINS AND ASSOCIATED PRICING FOR ATM, FRS, OR VS CALLING CARD SERVICE OR PRICES FOR THE EXTENSION PERIOD.
2. ALL CONTRACT REFERENCES TO A MAXIMUM PERIOD OF 120 MONTHS OR 10 YEARS ARE NOW CHANGED TO A MAXIMUM PERIOD OF 156 MONTHS OR 13 YEARS.
3. SECTION H, H.1 IS DELETED AND REPLACED WITH THE FOLLOWING: H.1 TYPE AND TERM OF CONTRACT THIS CONTRACT IS AN INDEFINITE DELIVERY, INDEFINITE QUANTITY, FIXED PRICE WITH A FORM OF ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT.
THE TERM OF THIS CONTRACT WILL BE FOUR YEARS FROM THE DATE OF AWARD WITH THREE (3) TWO-YEAR GOVERNMENT OPTIONS, FOLLOWED BY (3) ONE-YEAR OPTIONS TO EXTEND. THE TOTAL TERM OF THE CONTRACT WILL NOT EXCEED 156 MONTHS.
4. SECTION I IS DELETED IN ITS ENTIRETY AND REPLACED WITH THE ATTACHED SECTION I.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
